rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relationship to Gov't Code §2262.051, which governs the comptroller's contract management guide for state agency procurements. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 2262.051. CONTRACT MANAGEMENT GUIDE; RULES. (a) In consultation with the attorney general, the Department of Information Resources, and the state auditor, the comptroller shall develop or periodically update a contract management guide for use by state agencies.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns state contract management procedures and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
